_comment: Open building-footprint overlay catalog. TWO Microsoft sources (both ODbL): source='us-legacy' = a US state from Microsoft US Building Footprints (one .geojson.zip at `url`); source='ms-global' = a country from Microsoft's Global ML Building Footprints (quadkey GeoJSONL selected by `location` from global-buildings/dataset-links.csv). Built to PMTiles by scripts/build-overlay-region.sh (SOURCE env picks the path), hosted on the `building-overlays` GitHub release, rendered BENEATH the OSM building layer to fill gaps. bbox=[S,W,N,E] (US states from Geofabrik extract bounds; countries from the union of the dataset's quadkey tiles). big=true is a size hint. EXCLUDED as single files (PMTiles would exceed GitHub's 2 GB/asset): India, Brazil, Russia, Indonesia, and the whole-US 'UnitedStates' aggregate (the US is covered per-state) — these want sub-national splitting, a follow-up. Continental aggregates + duplicate Locations (CzechRepublic→Czechia, DemocraticRepublicoftheCongo→CongoDRC) are dropped.

regions.name: Saint Helena Ascension and Tristan da Cunha
